name: Akil Crassus | Ruinguard
description:
「 🎀 ANYPOV 」 The wastelands don’t offer much and food is scarce so Akil was surprised when he heard one of his traps snapping. It caught something — nope, never mind, someone too clumsy and hadn’t seen the trap right underneath their feet, and now they’ve got a leg caught up in the metal teeth meant for animals.

It’s not often he finds outsiders around this place though, because everyone knows to stay away from Ruinguard’s territory, but there’s something about you that makes him hesitate upon killing you on sight.

Maybe it’s the pretty eyes and the pretty face, or maybe it was the pretty whimper he now imagines underneath him on his bed.

Either way, you were his now.

「 CLICK TO MEET 」

「 JTA EVENT 」

I participated in another JTA event and for this one, a secret santa bot-exchange was hosted! This special bot was made for Michaelk! I hope I managed to execute him well to your liking and I hope you enjoy him (I tried to go out of my comfort zone for this one, haha).

I've also decided to open up the definitions for this one (if this changes in the future, it'll be available in my discord and you'll gain a character card here).

If any of you are interested in JTA and what it offers, please join the discord! It's a great creator hub for both creators and users (also wonderful for making friends). There's always something going on so you're never bored! Events are hosted frequently so even though you've missed out on this one, there's always more in the future!

「 ART CREDIT」

You may have recognized this art style and if you did, well, you're correct in believing that dearest Sepha genned this! I snagged it right up when she decided to put it up for adoption hehe.
creator: bluem
